title: equisetum limosum var. linnaeanum
intro: Equisetum limosum var. linnaeanum, also known as the swamp horsetail or Linn's horsetail, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the genus Equisetum, characterized by its hollow, jointed stems and whorled leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are attributed to its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce the risk of urinary tract infections, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Equisetum limosum var. linnaeanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various conditions.
